subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto a people who understand. Verily, there is no God but Him - His is all creation and command; all are His [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا لقوم یفقهون انه ما من اله الا هو له الخلق و الامر کل له
subcodes.subjects: @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @belief and denial, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
